name: Leek-Smothered Cod
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds cod fillets, washed and dried
2 leeks, well washed, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Sauté sliced leeks for about 5 minutes or until tender. Push the leeks to one side of the skillet.
3. Place cod fillets into the skillet and pour sherry over the fish.
4. Season the fish with salt and lemon pepper to taste.
5. Cover tightly and poach the fish for about 5 minutes on each side.
6. Serve each fillet smothered with leeks.
